skills.name: get-policy-brief
skills.description: Fetch a policy deep-dive brief (25 available) from NAER's policy knowledge hub. Returns full Markdown with front-matter, FAQ, and sources. Topics: campus safety, child protection, education reform, school lunch, teacher affairs.

input.topic: string (one of: campus-safety | child-rights | child-health | education-reform | school-lunch | teacher-affairs | health | youth-health)

skills.name: list-advocacy-data
skills.description: Query NAER's advocacy outcomes database (2023-2025): 113 press releases, 286 events, 7,917+ media mentions, 168+ partner organizations. Filter by year, topic, or stakeholder.

skills.name: summarize-organization
skills.description: Get NAER's organizational profile: mission, founding year (2012), topic coverage, partners, and recent advocacy positions.

cache_policy.hint: Content is updated weekly; safe to cache 1 hour.
